name: OrderManagement ProdTest
description:
Environment for Order Management Prod-Test.

- base_url, client_id, client_secret pre-filled from OrderManagement.txt
- access_token is auto-populated when you run request #1 (Get Auth Token)
- soap_endpoint: open GetToken_Checkout_OrderCaptureFunctionalTests-soapui-project.xml in a text editor, search for <con:endpoint> to find the SOAP URL, then paste it here
